item1.principal_address: 20 SW 27th Ave, Suite 300, Pompano Beach, FL 33069

parent.name: Anago Cleaning Systems, Inc. (ACS)
parent.relationship: Owns AFI; owns trademarks; guarantees AFI performance

affiliates.name: Estrellita, Inc. d/b/a Anago of South Florida
affiliates.role: Operates subfranchise business, sells unit franchises

affiliates.name: CTAD, Inc. d/b/a Anago of Boise
APLR, Inc.
affiliates.role: Acts as subfranchisor where no subfranchisor exists

item1.business_description: Master franchise — right to act as subfranchisor selling unit franchises for commercial janitorial/facilities services under the Anago brand within a defined territory
item1.industry_regulations: None specific; franchise registration laws apply

item5_initial_fees.fee_description: Initial Fee / Subfranchise Fee, payable in full upon signing, fully earned and non-refundable
item5_initial_fees.vetfran_discount: 15% off initial fee + no royalty for first 6 months (51%+ veteran ownership required)
item5_initial_fees.deposit_refund: Refunded less amounts per Deposit Agreement if franchise not offered or not executed within 30 days

website_maintenance.condition: Only if franchisor assumes website responsibility

item9.summary: Standard obligation cross-reference table. Key obligations: site selection (§1.4), pre-opening (§2.3), training (§2.1), fees (Art 4), standards (Arts 3/5/6), trademarks (Arts 5/6/10), products (Art 3), transfer (Art 7), renewal (§14.2), non-compete (Art 10), disputes (Art 13), personal guaranty (Exh III)

item10.summary: No direct or indirect financing offered. No guarantees of franchisee obligations.

pre_opening_support: Initial training 2 weeks (23 hrs classroom + 113 hrs OTJ)
Pre-opening assistance (brochures, supplier lists, client lists, advertising setup)
item11.site_requirements: 1,000-1,500 sq ft office within Area; must secure within 90 days

item12.territory_definition: Defined counties per agreement, minimum 500,000 population
item12.exclusivity: Not exclusive, but franchisor won't grant another subfranchisor in same Area during term (if not in default)
item12.territory_reduction_risk: May reduce Area if minimum Client Bid schedule not met
item12.national_account_definition: Client with 10+ locations in Area, or multi-location crossing Area boundaries, or RFP responses
item12.market_developer_overlap: Not anticipated; no specific conflict resolution established

item13.infringement_risk: License termination could terminate franchise agreement

item14.copyrights: Claimed in Manuals (not registered); trade secrets
item14.confidentiality: Broad obligations; agreements required for all with access

item15.designated_manager: Controlling shareholder/managing member; must complete training
item15.owner_participation: Must supervise day-to-day operations; exclusively in charge of HR decisions

item16.permitted_activities: Selling Anago Unit Franchises, supporting Unit Franchises, janitorial/approved services
item16.prohibited: No other business from office; no unauthorized products/services; no branded items without consent
item16.pricing_control: Franchisor may set max/min prices subject to applicable law

renewal_conditions: Not in default, all debts satisfied
Sign then-current successor agreement (may have materially different terms) + general release
Successor min royalty >= avg of last year
item17_contract_terms.noncompete_post_term_scope: Within Area, any other subfranchisor's area, or 20 miles of perimeter
item17_contract_terms.dispute_resolution: Binding arbitration (AAA Commercial Rules, 1 arbitrator, Pompano Beach FL area)
item17_contract_terms.venue: State/federal court closest to Pompano Beach FL

item19_fpr.metric: Average Annual Sales (total billed for janitorial services + unit franchise sales revenue)

tables.description: Average Annual Sales by Years in Operation (as of Dec 31, 2025)

caveats: AAS ≠ profits or net income; subject to deductions per Item 6
AAS ≠ Gross Revenues for fee calculation
Table 3 header mislabeled as '2023' — data organized by operational maturity as of Dec 31, 2025

gag_clause_evidence.quote_fragment: certain Subfranchisors have signed confidentiality provisions restricting their ability to speak openly about their experience with us

item21_financial_statements.entity_audited: Anago Cleaning Systems, Inc. and Subsidiaries
item21_financial_statements.parent_guaranty_description: ACS guarantees AFI's performance of all obligations under each Subfranchise Rights Agreement
key_observations: Revenue flat year-over-year ($9.42M→$9.39M) while OpEx grew 5.3% — margin compression
Investment portfolio grew from $2.39M to $3.78M — active investment strategy
Strong balance sheet: $6.65M equity vs $2.24M liabilities; current ratio ~7.4x
$529,500 related-party note receivable at 2.94%, due May 2038

CA: FL choice of law may not be enforceable
General release may be void under Corp Code §31512
Max price agreements = per se Cartwright Act violations
IL: Choice of forum/venue deleted (void under §4 IL Franchise Disclosure Act)
Waiver of IL FD Act compliance is void
MD: General release excludes MD Franchise Law claims
Bankruptcy termination may not be enforceable
MI: Michigan Franchise Investment Law protections (termination, renewal, transfer, arbitration venue)
Escrow of initial investment may be required if net worth <$100K
MN: No waiver of jury trial rights
Release excludes MN Franchise Law claims
NY: Termination by franchisee on any grounds available by law
VA: Franchisor cannot cancel without reasonable cause per VA Retail Franchising Act
WA: WA Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails over inconsistent FDD/agreement terms

unresolveds.description: Item 19 Table 3 header says '2023' but data appears to represent groupings by years in operation as of December 31, 2025
Minimum Annual Performance Requirements mentioned as non-curable termination trigger (Item 17, §8.2 #22) but specific thresholds not disclosed in FDD body — likely in agreement or Manuals
Guaranty of Performance text referenced in Exhibit F cover but not separately extracted; may be embedded within financial statement pages or may be a brief statement

Item 20 domestic Table 3 shows CA outlets declining from 4 to 1 to 0 (2023-2025) under 'Ceased Operations Other Reasons' with footnote about Market Developer conversions — the conversions are not truly ceased operations but reclassifications
